title: Minimum Number of Taps to Open to Water a Garden
hints: Convert each tap into the interval it covers. The problem becomes selecting the fewest intervals to fully cover the range [0, n].
Sort the intervals by their start points. This allows you to greedily pick the interval that extends the coverage furthest to the right.
Maintain the furthest point reachable so far. At each step, choose the valid interval that maximizes this reach. If you cannot extend beyond the current end, it is impossible.
